name: binary-bug-detection
description: Find security vulnerabilities in ELF binaries using ClearBit IR analysis. Includes four skills: taint-bug-detection (buffer overflow, command injection, use-after-free in standalone binaries), iot-bug-detection (cross-binary taint analysis for IoT firmware via IPC bridge stitching), cisb-bug-detection (compiler-introduced security bugs — DSE, null-check elimination, UB-based optimizations, timing side-channels), and write-custom-query (custom ClearBit IR queries for targeted analysis). Orchestrates Plan, Analyze, and Validate sub-agents. Requires ClearBit MCP to be configured in the client.
